direction.phrase: redesign the home page — analyse and suggest direction
movements: distinctiveness: familiar → distinctive (tracker leads, not hero photo)
IA priority: marketing-first hero → tool-first hero
CTA vocabulary: 3 fragmented verbs → 4 canonical (Track / Get a quote / Start shipping / Log in)
type scale: ad-hoc per template → modular ratio ~1.25
alt-text floor: 60% empty → 0% accidental empty above the fold
<h1> presence: empty (image-baked hero) → display H1 above the tracker

seed.pickedBy: Mode A — brand-faithful pinning + density tier user-pick

variants.name: Tool-First Home
variants.thesis: The Track / Quote / Ship / Billing tabs ARE the hero. Above the fold carries one display H1 (verb-led, pivoting per active tab), the tab strip, a 56px input, a single gold CTA, plus a captured-live photo on the right for warmth. Marketing offers, alerts (compressed to a header chip with pulse), and the cookie consent band live below or quietly at the edges. Treats return visitors looking up a tracking number as the headline use case — the dominant audience by frequency on a freight site.

current.note: Captured screenshot is preserved upstream of this sample (thumbnail.png shows the proposed redesign, not the current). The captured live home leads with an empty <h1>, image-baked hero, full-width red service-alerts strip, and the IEEPA tariff promo strip — pushing the Track/Quote/Ship/Billing tabs (the workhorse) to a secondary band. Roboto throughout. 60-85 CSS custom properties already on :root (multi-brand-aware token system covering UPS, UPS Store, UPS Healthcare).
